title: implement pod stats
body:
Implement pod stats for the local and remote client. Both code paths end
up in infra/abi to allow for code share.

Signed-off-by: Valentin Rothberg <rothberg@redhat.com>

comments.body:

Needs approval from an approver in each of these files: - ~~[OWNERS](https://github.com/containers/libpod/blob/master/OWNERS)~~ [vrothberg] Approvers can indicate their approval by writing `/approve` in a comment Approvers can cancel approval by writing `/approve cancel` in a comment

> Need to enable e2e tests

pod tests fail with "Error: cannot use pod namespace as container is not joining a pod or pod has no infra container: invalid argument" which happens in specgen.

I suggest getting this PR in and tackle the pod tests after.
@vrothberg Sujil mentioned the pod thing to me, so I'm working on it now.
